thoughts_kody_engine_clijs_568712180095.content: ensureFeatureBranchIfNeeded only synced base branch when prNumber was set — it never checked out the PR head branch, so pipeline ran on wrong branch.

thoughts_kody_engine_568714245476.content: The fix target is the compiled engine at node_modules/@kody-ade/engine/dist/bin/cli.js, not source. Must also add prHeadBranch to ctx.input.

facts_kody_engine_patch_strategy_5687154.content: When patching a dependency's compiled output, both the context population and the function logic must be updated together.

conventions_kody_engine_pr_context_56871.content: PR details from getPRDetails include both baseBranch and headBranch — both must be stored in ctx.input and used together.

thoughts_review_stage_875283356855.content: Pipeline max_turns crash during review stage caused the fix to never be applied — the build agent wrote the plan but never executed the edits.

facts_verification_875284761844.content: When a stage depends on a prior stage (P2T06), verify the fix actually exists in the changeset before marking the stage complete.

thoughts_build_stage_875286346627.content: The engine fix requires editing `node_modules/@kody-ade/engine/dist/bin/cli.js` directly; changes to project scaffolding alone do not satisfy the task.

thoughts_srcsharedpipelinets_96159786466.content: In ensureFeatureBranchIfNeeded, when prNumber is set (fix-ci on existing PR), the code syncs the base branch but never checks out the PR's head branch, causing pipeline to run on default branch.

conventions_kody_961599674689.content: Kody fix push to existing PR must land on the same PR branch, not create a new branch or new PR.

thoughts_pipeline_verification_118319507.content: Pipeline review caught that 'kody fix' runs may produce a plan file without actually applying any code changes — the fix was never applied, causing FAIL verdict.

facts_pipelinebranching_1266139083066.content: fix-ci on a PR requires both fetching the PR head ref AND explicitly checking it out; syncing base alone is insufficient
